title: Add automated grid trading logic frontend integration

requirements.summary: Update BotControlPanel to reflect running/stopped state and display order placement errors
acceptanceCriteria: BotControlPanel shows 'Running' status when the timer loop is active
BotControlPanel shows 'Stopped' status when the bot is not running
Order placement errors returned by the backend are displayed as dismissible alerts in BotControlPanel

file_operations.description: Enhance the status display logic to accurately reflect the bot's running state from the backend timer loop. Update the error alert section to handle and display order placement errors specifically (in addition to start/stop errors). Ensure the running/stopped badge updates reactively when the backend timer state changes. Add logic to poll or refresh bot status more frequently when the bot is running to catch state transitions promptly.

Review and adjust the polling interval for useBotStatus to ensure the frontend receives timely updates when the backend timer loop starts or stops. Consider adding a more aggressive polling strategy (e.g., every 2-3 seconds) when the bot is in a running state to surface order placement errors quickly. Ensure error states from backend mutations are properly surfaced to the UI layer.
